disclaimer: This is a real-time world simulation. Watch Adam and Eve explore their worlds and interact in real-time.

entities.name: East Adam
entities.description: Smart, thoughtful builder. The first man of the East, exploring his environment.

entities.name: East Eve
entities.description: Very smart, relational. The first woman of the East, seeking connection and deep understanding.

entities.name: West Adam
entities.description: Creative explorer. The first human of the West, fascinated by construction and discovery.

entities.name: West Eve
entities.description: Fast, curious discoverer. The first woman of the West, seeking out the hidden secrets of the frontier.

entities.name: The Garden of Eden
entities.description: The beautiful, pristine garden of creation, filled with abundant fruit and perfect harmony.

entities.name: The Tree of Knowledge
entities.description: The mysterious tree standing at the center of the garden. A boundary lines this place: 'Do not eat from it.'

entities.name: Whispering Serpent's Hollow
entities.description: A dark, shaded cavern from which low, tempting whispers are sometimes carried on the wind.

entities.name: The Valley of Dawn
entities.description: The home base of the Western pioneers, set in a fertile valley surrounded by wild highlands.

entities.name: The Obsidian Caves
entities.description: A cave network glittering with rich ores and obsidian, ideal for building advanced tools.

entities.name: The Hidden Oasis
entities.description: A radiant, shimmering pool surrounded by glowing flowers, rumoured to restore vitality.

entities.name: The Gihon River
entities.description: One of the four rivers flowing out of Eden to water the garden.

entities.name: The Pishon River
entities.description: The river winding through the Western lands, rich in natural elements and gold.
